column1: D1-ext-G: LONG-consensus reliable=False (mean +1.92bps hit 50% netSh +0.62); SHORT-consensus reliable=False (mean -0.27bps hit 53% netSh -0.09); |V|-mono ρ=-0.60; placebo fails.
